title: Mahagun Group Capital India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Mahagun Group Capital India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahagun Group Capital India are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahagun Group Capital India:
Mahagun Group Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group Capital India!
